name: Claude Code (with host credential passthrough)
description: Installs Anthropic's Claude Code CLI and bind-mounts the host's ~/.claude/.credentials.json into the container so you don't have to re-authenticate.

claudeVersion.description: Version of @anthropic-ai/claude-code to install from npm (e.g. 'latest', '1.2.3').

nodeVersion.description: Informational only. The node feature dependency is pinned to 'lts'; to override, add ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/node yourself with the desired version.

passthroughHostAuth.description: If true, wire the host's Claude Code auth into the container at postCreate: symlink ~/.claude/.credentials.json (so token refreshes flow back to the host) and copy ~/.claude.json (account/onboarding state — copied, not linked, because Claude rewrites it constantly with container-local paths). Both halves are needed together; either alone leaves Claude broken. The bind mounts are always declared; this flag only controls whether link/copy runs.
